violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Upper interior splash area of microwave needs cleaning. Bottom-inside AdvantEdge reachin cooler in front service area noted in need of cleaning.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling and wall areas in kitchen noted in need of repairs. One light cover in mens restroom noted wet-stained needs cleaning. (also-repair any water leaks above this light fixture)
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in women's toilet stalls.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Disposable towel dispenser noted empty at hand washing lavatory in food prep area.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Spray bottle behind bar noted not labeled.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids.(lids are up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall and ceiling areas in kitchen noted in need of repairs. Ceiling light cover in mens restroom needs cleaning. Ceiling vent cover in mens restroom needs cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Pop gun drains behind bar noted in need of routine cleaning.
